title: task
description: rust/lichen-embassy/src/esp32s3.rs:15-25 - Uses `lora_phy::{RadioError, InterfaceVariant}` but these are private in lora-phy 3.x. Correct imports: `lora_phy::mod_params::RadioError` and `lora_phy::mod_traits::InterfaceVariant`. Module fails to compile with feature `esp32s3`.
close_reason: Fixed: Added 'self' to sx126x import to allow sx126x::Config usage. Imports now correctly use lora_phy::mod_params::RadioError, lora_phy::mod_traits::InterfaceVariant, and lora_phy::sx126x::{self, ...} for lora-phy 3.x compatibility
